nasb.text: Whoever shall mix any like it or whoever puts any of it on a layman shall be cut off from his people.’ ”

esv.text: Whoever compounds any like it or whoever puts any of it on an outsider shall be cut off from his people.’”

cnv.text: 無論誰配製相似的膏油，或把這膏油抹在外人的身上，這人就一定要從他的族人中被剪除。’”

ccb.text: 任何人若仿制或用这油抹祭司以外的人，要将他从民中铲除。’”
